paragraphs.en: My name is Emma. I have a big family. There are six people in my family.
paragraphs.fr: Je m'appelle Emma. J'ai une grande famille. Il y a six personnes dans ma famille.

paragraphs.en: This is my mother. Her name is Sophie. This is my father. His name is David.
paragraphs.fr: Voici ma mere. Elle s'appelle Sophie. Voici mon pere. Il s'appelle David.

paragraphs.en: I have a brother. His name is Lucas. He is ten years old. I also have a little sister. Her name is Chloe.
paragraphs.fr: J'ai un frere. Il s'appelle Lucas. Il a dix ans. J'ai aussi une petite soeur. Elle s'appelle Chloe.

paragraphs.en: And we have a baby! The baby is very small. I love my family very much.
paragraphs.fr: Et nous avons un bebe ! Le bebe est tres petit. J'aime beaucoup ma famille.

vocabulary.example: My father works in an office.

vocabulary.definition_en: un membre de la famille du meme sexe masculin, ne des memes parents
un membre de la famille de sexe feminin, nee des memes parents
vocabulary.example: My sister is five years old.

vocabulary.definition_en: un groupe de personnes liees entre elles

grammar_points.title: "I have..." / "This is my..."
grammar_points.explanation: Utilisez **"I have"** pour exprimer la possession (en français : "J'ai"). Utilisez **"This is my..."** pour présenter quelqu'un ou quelque chose (en français : "Voici mon/ma..."). Remarque : en anglais, 'my' ne change pas au masculin ou au féminin.
examples: I have a brother. = J'ai un frere.
I have a big family. = J'ai une grande famille.
This is my mother. = Voici ma mere.
This is my father. = Voici mon pere.

expressions.example: This is my sister. Her name is Chloe.
expressions.note: S'utilise pour présenter une personne. 'This is my mother', 'This is my friend Tom'.

expressions.example: I have a brother and a sister.
expressions.note: On utilise 'a' devant un nom singulier. 'I have a dog', 'I have a big house'.

written.question: How do you say 'J'ai un frere' in English?
written.explanation: We use 'I have' (not 'I has' or 'I am') to express possession with 'I'.

written.question: What is the English word for 'soeur'?

written.sentence: This is my ________. Her name is Sophie.

written.french: Voici mon pere. Il s'appelle David.
written.suggested_answer: This is my father. His name is David.

oral.instruction: Read these sentences aloud slowly and clearly.
oral.text: This is my mother. Her name is Sophie. I have a brother and a sister.
oral.focus: Pay attention to the 'th' sound in 'this' and 'mother'. Put your tongue between your teeth.

oral.question: Do you have a brother or a sister? Tell me about your family.
oral.suggested_answer: I have a brother. His name is [name]. I have a mother and a father.
